title: Discrepant Join Result on the same-value join condition
description:
## Bug Report



### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 TEXT(5) );
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 TEXT(5) );


INSERT INTO t0 VALUES (' ');
INSERT INTO t1(c0) VALUES ('');

select (t0.c0 = t1.c0) from t0,t1;

SELECT *
FROM t0
         INNER JOIN t1 ON (NOT (t0.c0 LIKE t1.c0));


SELECT *
FROM t0
         INNER JOIN t1 ON ((t0.c0 = t1.c0) AND (NOT (t0.c0 LIKE t1.c0)));


```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
```
Q1:
1
Q2:
 , 
(will produce the result of t0.c0, t1.c0,)
Q3:
 , 
(will produce the result of t0.c0, t1.c0,)
```

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
```
Q1:
1
Q2:
 , 
(will produce the result of t0.c0, t1.c0,)
Q3:
empty result
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
```
Release Version: v9.0.0-beta.1.pre-389-g21f9bb7b7a
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 21f9bb7b7a7478d825c4dee4fbf2ce913e3e7cf1
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2025-03-11 09:37:34
GoVersion: go1.23.7
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 TEXT NOT NULL, c1 INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 TEXT NOT NULL, c1 INTEGER DEFAULT 1);
SELECT * FROM t2 INNER JOIN t3 ON (t2.c0 = t3.c0) WHERE t2.c1 > 0;
key_bug_features: Discrepant results from same-value join condition
